note: h(n) = log10 of the width-n transfer eigenvalue, per cell. The sequence decreases to the 2-D entropy density h_infinity (Fekete). h(1), h(2) computed exactly here; h(3), h(4) and h_infinity from the offline width-n sweep.
blockCountsNote: Valid n×n blocks from the official interior pieces (all internal edges matched, free outer border). Variant A = pieces reusable (the colour-matching grammar); Variant B = each piece used at most once (true E2). B/A is the scarcity penalty. A(1)=B(1), A(2), B(2) verified exactly in-repo; A(3) from the vault's broken-profile DP counter.
